title: Vellosiella dracocephaloides
intro: Vellosiella dracocephaloides is a plant species commonly known as a medicinal herb, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Vellosiella dracocephaloides include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Vellosiella dracocephaloides is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.

Within the family Asteraceae, Vellosiella dracocephaloides is part of the subfamily Carduoideae. This subfamily also comprises other species such as the cardoon and artichoke. Vellosiella dracocephaloides is native to South America and is characterized by its unique leaf morphology.
